name: Loan Money Till Payday
description_short: Cash Me Loans is a lender marketplace connecting borrowers to personal loan providers offering $1K–$50K with potential next-business-day funding and APRs ranging 5.99%–35.99%.
description_long:
Cash Me Loans operates as a loan aggregator or lender-connection service rather than a direct lender. The company partners with a network of lending partners to facilitate personal loan applications for consumers seeking emergency funds, debt consolidation, or major expenses. Borrowers complete a single online form that is distributed to multiple lenders, reducing the friction of applying to multiple platforms separately.

The platform offers personal loans up to $50,000 with APRs between 5.99% and 35.99%, repayment terms ranging from 61 days to 72 months, and potential funding within one business day of approval. The application process is streamlined—taking fewer than 5 minutes to complete—with fast online decisions typically issued within minutes. All data transmission uses 256-bit SSL encryption. Cash Me Loans explicitly states it is not a lender and does not perform credit checks; partner lenders handle creditworthiness assessment and underwriting.

A key distinguishing factor is the marketplace model: borrowers submit once and may receive multiple loan offers from different lenders, allowing comparison of terms and rates before acceptance. The company emphasizes speed, privacy (online-only application), and accessibility, contrasting with traditional in-branch lending. However, this aggregator model also means Cash Me Loans does not set rates or terms—those are determined entirely by partner lenders, and policies on renewals, late fees, and collections vary by lender.

This service is best suited for borrowers with adequate credit who qualify for competitive rates and need fast funding. The wide APR range (5.99%–35.99%) indicates significant rate variation depending on creditworthiness; consumers with poor credit may face the higher end or may not qualify. Borrowers should carefully review individual lender terms before accepting, as Cash Me Loans provides a platform but does not guarantee loan approval, favorable rates, or specific features.
pros: Potential funding within 24 hours (next business day) after approval
Single online application distributed to multiple lenders, saving time versus applying to each separately
Loan amounts up to $50,000 available for larger expenses or consolidation
Fast online decision typically within minutes
Application takes less than 5 minutes to complete
256-bit SSL encryption protects personal data in transmission
No requirement to visit a physical location; fully online and private process
APR floor of 5.99% potentially available for well-qualified borrowers
cons: APR range extends to 35.99%, which is high and may be unaffordable for subprime borrowers
Company is not a direct lender; terms, rates, fees, and renewal policies vary by partner lender and are not controlled or guaranteed by Cash Me Loans
No credit check by Cash Me Loans itself means limited transparency upfront about approval likelihood or rate qualification before submitting personal information
Minimum 61-day repayment term and maximum 72-month term may not suit all borrowing needs
Late payments may result in additional fees and collection activities, with policies differing by lender
best_for: Borrowers with good-to-excellent credit seeking competitive rates and fast funding for emergencies or major expenses
Consumers who want to compare loan offers from multiple lenders without submitting separate applications to each
Individuals needing personal loans between $1,000 and $50,000 and comfortable with online-only application processes
Borrowers seeking next-business-day funding and willing to accept varying terms across different lender partners
diagnosis: Cash Me Loans is ideal for credit-qualified borrowers who need fast personal loans and prefer the convenience of a single application to compare offers across multiple lenders. The critical caveat is that this is an aggregator platform without control over partner lender terms, rates, or approval—borrowers must carefully review individual lender agreements before accepting, and those with poor credit should expect rates at the high end of the range or possible denial.
services: Online personal loan application and marketplace matching
Connection to network of multiple lending partners
Potential next-business-day direct bank deposit funding
Repayment terms from 61 days to 72 months
Secured 256-bit SSL encryption for personal data transmission
Comparison of terms and rates from multiple lenders before acceptance
Centralized application reducing need to fill out multiple lender forms
